sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44925" key="eu(resiloge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὑρεσι-λογέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὑρεσι-λογία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὑρεσί-λογος</orth>, <sense id="n44925.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὑρησιλογέω</ref></xr>, etc.</sense> </entryFree>
